changes_made: Renamed k8s_pod_disaster_recovery_plan_documented to k8s_config_disaster_recovery_plan_documented for consistency with resource naming
Renamed k8s_cluster_backup_and_restore_tested to k8s_etcd_backup_and_restore_tested for specificity
review_notes: The functions are relevant to the HIPAA contingency plan control, focusing on backup and disaster recovery in Kubernetes. The original naming was mostly clear but required adjustments for consistency and specificity. The functions map well to Kubernetes practices for ensuring data availability and recovery.
naming_improvements: Use 'config' for documentation-related checks to align with ConfigMaps and configuration management
Specify 'etcd' in backup and restore testing to clarify the focus on etcd data
title: 164_308_a_7_i: 164.308(a)(7)(i) Contingency plan
step1_reasoning: The HIPAA contingency plan control requires organizations to have a plan for data backup, disaster recovery, and emergency mode operation. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring etcd backups are configured, documenting a disaster recovery plan for pods and workloads, and regularly testing the backup and restore process for the cluster.
